summary: Iteration 25: Testing BluBridge PDF v2 Import/Export features. Backend: 22/22 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Export button works correctly (downloads CSV), Import button UI present but DOES NOT call backend API. Critical bug found in handleImport function.

integration_issues.issue: handleImport function does NOT call POST /api/bb/import-scores endpoint. It only reads file locally and shows fake success message without actually importing data to backend.

backend: GET /api/bb/job-roles - returns list of job roles
GET /api/bb/form-types - returns list of form types
GET /api/bb/hiring-forms - returns list of hiring forms
POST /api/bb/verify-otp - returns Invalid OTP for wrong data
POST /api/bb/import-scores - returns 400 when no file uploaded
POST /api/bb/import-scores - imports valid CSV file (3 records)
frontend: Login with 'Admin User'/'Admin User' redirects to /home
/update-scores Import button has hidden file input accepting .csv,.xlsx

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update handleImport function in /app/frontend/src/pages/UpdateScores.js to call POST /api/bb/import-scores endpoint with FormData containing the file
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG: handleImport (lines 88-100) reads file locally but NEVER calls backend API. Should use FormData and POST to /api/bb/import-scores
Backend POST /api/bb/import-scores endpoint is correctly implemented and tested
Export functionality works correctly - generates CSV with NAME, DATE OF INTERVIEW, JOB ROLE, STATUS columns
Email/WhatsApp messaging functions are STUBBED as expected (not tested per instructions)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for form types, hiring forms, registrations. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import button UI is present but handleImport function does not call backend API. Backend endpoint POST /api/bb/import-scores works correctly. Fix needed in /app/frontend/src/pages/UpdateScores.js handleImport function to use FormData and axios.post to /api/bb/import-scores.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Import report button does not actually import data
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: handleImport function in UpdateScores.js (lines 88-100) only reads file content locally and shows a fake success toast. It never calls the backend POST /api/bb/import-scores endpoint.
reproduction_steps: 3. Click Import report button and select a CSV file
4. Toast shows 'Imported X records' but data is NOT actually imported to database
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Update handleImport to use FormData and call axios.post(`${API}/api/bb/import-scores`, formData, { withCredentials: true, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' } })
